name: pacc
summary: PACC - Provider Automatic Configuration for Clients (draft-ietf-mailmaint-pacc)
description: Implements draft-ietf-mailmaint-pacc for automatic mail client configuration. Provides a /.well-known/pacc.json endpoint returning IMAP/SMTP/JMAP/CalDAV/CardDAV configuration with OAuth2 issuer information. Also enhances OIDC dynamic registration to support native clients with loopback redirect URIs and public clients (no client_secret).
author: Xavier Guimard <yadd@debian.org>
